description_long: This skateboard features a yellow deck adorned with a large, cartoon-style graphic of a character in orange and blue clothing, lying horizontally across the board. The deck has a classic popsicle shape with upturned nose and tail, and the edges are slightly rounded. The wheels are blue and attached to standard trucks, which are visible from the side views. The surface of the deck appears smooth and glossy, with the graphic design covering most of the visible area. No visible grip tape is present on the top, suggesting the deck is either unfinished or the grip tape is transparent. The skateboard is compact and lightweight, suitable for street or park use.
description: A yellow skateboard with a cartoon character graphic, blue wheels, and a smooth, glossy deck. The board has a classic shape and no visible grip tape.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow deck with the cartoon character's head and upper body most prominent.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the upturned nose and tail, blue wheels, and the full length of the graphic.
description_view_2: Rear view with the character's legs and lower body most visible, and the deck's shape clearly outlined.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the blue wheels and the deck's curvature.
attribute_deck_graphic_design: A large cartoon character in orange shirt and blue shorts, lying horizontally across the yellow deck, with a playful and bold illustration style. No text or additional motifs are visible.
attribute_wheel_type: street, blue, classic shape, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard trucks, metallic color, standard mounting, no visible branding or unique features
